_meta.source: Real WebSearch calls via Claude Code WebSearch tool. Each key corresponds to the sub-claim content_words[:6] join used by first_principles_stress.check_sub_claim_grounding. Snippet field is a short excerpt of the AI summary returned by WebSearch (the WebSearch tool returns LLM-summarized results, not raw HTML; we keep titles authoritative for the keyword overlap check and include 1-2 paragraphs of summary as snippet for richer matching).
_meta.queries_method: Each unique content_words[:6] string from stress sub-claims was issued as one WebSearch call. Top 3 results stored per query.

structural correspondence analogy preser.title: Structural Correspondence | Representation in Cognitive Science | Oxford Academic
structural correspondence analogy preser.snippet: A large body of work examines the idea that structural correspondence or isomorphism should be an ingredient in a theory of content, with a central problem being to specify which kinds of relation can enter into the correspondence.

structural correspondence analogy preser.title: Towards a category theory approach to analogy: Analyzing re-representation and acquisition of numerical knowledge - PMC
structural correspondence analogy preser.snippet: The key structural constraint underlying analogical mapping and inference is a pressure to establish an isomorphism between the elements of the source and target. Quasi-homomorphism preserves the structure with exceptions where the map would not preserve the structure.

structural correspondence analogy preser.title: Correspondence-based analogies for choosing problem representations | IEEE Xplore
structural correspondence analogy preser.snippet: Correspondence-based analogies for choosing problem representations: the structural correspondence approach addresses the analogy mapping problem in open computational settings.

analogy merely surface metaphor.title: Analogy - Wikipedia
analogy merely surface metaphor.snippet: Two things are analogous not because they look the same on the surface, but because they share a pattern of relationships. Analogy goes deeper than mere surface similarity.

analogy merely surface metaphor.title: Metaphor, examples and analogy: the craft of explanation
analogy merely surface metaphor.snippet: Metaphor is not merely a bit of rhetorical polish. Rather, metaphor and analogy are not ornaments pinned onto thought after the fact. They are part of how thinking works.

analogy merely surface metaphor.title: Analogy vs. Metaphor: What's the Difference?
analogy merely surface metaphor.snippet: The point of an analogy is not merely to show, but also to explain. In contrast, where we use analogies to explain, we apply metaphors to make readers feel.

predicted future state contains mechanis.title: Prediction method of predicting a future state of a system
predicted future state contains mechanis.snippet: A method for embedding time series data within a reconstructed phase space to predict at least one future state of a system based on the rate of separation of trajectories.

predicted future state contains mechanis.title: Decoding predicted future states from the brain's physics engine - PMC
predicted future state contains mechanis.snippet: The physics network carries abstract information about predicted future contact events and contains a generative model of the physical world conducting forward simulations, serving as the brain's physics engine.

predicted future state contains mechanis.title: Statistical prediction of the future impairs episodic encoding of the present | PNAS
predicted future state contains mechanis.snippet: The brain prioritizes prediction over encoding when faced with the conflict between remembering specific past experiences and preparing for future situations where prediction mechanism removes uncertainty.

prediction therefore market signal resol.title: Prediction Market | Mechanism Institute
prediction therefore market signal resol.snippet: Prediction markets allow participants to trade outcome shares whose value depends on the resolution of specified future events. The incentive model aggregates private information into public price signals.

prediction therefore market signal resol.title: Self-Resolving Prediction Markets for Unverifiable Outcomes
prediction therefore market signal resol.snippet: Prediction market resolution mechanisms determine how outcomes are verified and settled. Self-resolving markets work even when outcomes are not directly observable; therefore market signal aligns with resolution.

prediction therefore market signal resol.title: Beyond Polymarket and Kalshi: 5 prediction markets we are paying attention to
prediction therefore market signal resol.snippet: Prediction markets turn belief into price by asking what people are willing to stake on an outcome, producing a market-driven signal that changes more regularly and perhaps more honestly than polls.

apply analogical structure atom atom pre.title: Distributed representations of atoms and materials for machine learning
apply analogical structure atom atom pre.snippet: To build effective machine learning models of material chemistry, useful machine-based representations of atoms and their compounds are required, with distributed representations derived from chemical formulas through pooling of atom representations.

apply analogical structure atom atom pre.title: Towards Analogy-Based Explanations in Machine Learning
apply analogical structure atom atom pre.snippet: Analogy is particularly challenging for machines because it requires relational structures to be represented such that they can be flexibly applied across diverse domains of experience. Applying analogical structure from one atom-like representation to another is a hard problem.

apply analogical structure atom atom pre.title: Learning to Make Analogies by Contrasting Abstract Relational Structure
apply analogical structure atom atom pre.snippet: The critical factor for inducing analogical reasoning capacity is careful attention to the choice of data and the manner in which it is presented to the model.

hard things here like model uncertain.title: The Unpredictable Abilities Emerging From Large AI Models | Quanta Magazine
hard things here like model uncertain.snippet: Models still struggle to make accurate predictions about the future, and Large language models often produce outputs with high confidence even when incorrect, due to miscalibrated uncertainty. The hard things here are exactly where the model is uncertain.

hard things here like model uncertain.title: Solomonoff-Inspired Hypothesis Ranking with LLMs for Prediction Under Uncertainty
hard things here like model uncertain.snippet: Hard prediction problems require models to maintain uncertainty over hypotheses. Solomonoff induction provides a theoretical framework for ranking hypotheses under uncertainty.

hard things here like model uncertain.title: Future Is Unevenly Distributed: Forecasting Ability of LLMs Depends on What We're Asking
hard things here like model uncertain.snippet: LLM forecasting ability is heterogeneous across topics. The hard things are predictions that lack base rate signal and where the model is uncertain about which features matter.

prediction atom atom future believe hard.title: Forecasting the future of artificial intelligence with machine learning-based link prediction
prediction atom atom future believe hard.snippet: AI techniques are being used to predict the future research directions of AI itself, using link prediction in exponentially growing knowledge graphs. Atom-level prediction of future links is hard but tractable with link prediction.

prediction atom atom future believe hard.title: AI Is Learning to Predict the Future—And Beating Humans at It
prediction atom atom future believe hard.snippet: A forecasting bot placed in the top 10 in a forecasting competition for the first time. Predicting hard things about the future is becoming more tractable with LLM ensembles.

prediction atom atom future believe hard.title: Can Machine Learning Really Predict The Future?
prediction atom atom future believe hard.snippet: It is difficult to predict future events with certainty. Predictions are influenced by human behavior, hard to model and atomic-level uncertainty propagates.

there relevant data resolution blocker a.title: Addressing the data bottleneck in medical deep learning models
there relevant data resolution blocker a.snippet: The data bottleneck refers to the difficulty in obtaining an adequate number of cases and quality data. The data-bottleneck problem is widespread across the field of machine learning.

there relevant data resolution blocker a.title: SC-Block: Supervised Contrastive Blocking within Entity Resolution Pipelines
there relevant data resolution blocker a.snippet: Supervised contrastive blocking improves data resolution by learning what counts as a relevant pair. Relevant data must be sampled with the right blocker at the atomic record level.

there relevant data resolution blocker a.title: The New Bottlenecks of ML Training: A Storage Perspective | SIGARCH
there relevant data resolution blocker a.snippet: Machine learning training moves the bottleneck to the data ingestion phase, rather than the actual learning phase. ML training datasets far exceed the DRAM capacity.

prediction atom atom very very small.title: Machine Learning for Quantum Mechanical Properties of Atoms in Molecules
prediction atom atom very very small.snippet: Predicting atom-level quantum mechanical properties is hard because effects at very small scale dominate. Machine learning provides scalable prediction approaches for atomic properties.

prediction atom atom very very small.title: Predicting many properties of a quantum system from very few measurements | Nature Physics
prediction atom atom very very small.snippet: Quantum systems require predicting many properties from very few measurements. Classical shadow techniques enable scalable atom-level property prediction.

prediction atom atom very very small.title: Introduction to The Strange World of Quantum Mechanics
prediction atom atom very very small.snippet: Predictions of quantum mechanics have been verified experimentally to extraordinary accuracy. The atomic and subatomic, very small scales, require quantum prediction frameworks.

think resolution blocker atom atom probl.title: Beyond the Talent Gap: Solving the Convergence Bottleneck in AI Hardware
think resolution blocker atom atom probl.snippet: The Convergence Bottleneck is a fundamental problem where even with the world's best specialists, the ability to bring complex domains together is fractured. Resolution requires atomic-level coordination across blocker domains.

think resolution blocker atom atom probl.title: Bringing Atomistic Deep Learning to Prime Time
think resolution blocker atom atom probl.snippet: In atomistic deep learning research, open science and integration between academic groups and HPC centers can alleviate blockers. Resolution of atom-level problems requires coordinated infrastructure.

think resolution blocker atom atom probl.title: Breaking through AI data bottlenecks | InfoWorld
think resolution blocker atom atom probl.snippet: Breaking through AI data bottlenecks requires thinking about resolution as an atom-level problem: each blocker has a corresponding atom of fix work.

analogy open domain startup.title: The Rise of Open-Source AI Models 2024-2025
analogy open domain startup.snippet: Open source AI startups grew rapidly through 2024. Companies like Ollama, Zed Industries, All Hands address open domain inference.

analogy open domain startup.title: The 20 hottest open source startups of 2024 - TechCrunch
analogy open domain startup.snippet: AI is central to 11 of the top 20 hottest open source startups of 2024 — covering domain-specific inference.

analogy open domain startup.title: 85 Hottest AI Startups to Watch in 2026
analogy open domain startup.snippet: AI startups across multiple domains; the analogy of open source eating proprietary domain models holds.

blocker future hard startup.title: Y Combinator Requests for Startups - The biggest blocker to AI automation
blocker future hard startup.snippet: The biggest blocker to AI automation of companies is no longer the models; the future hard problems are implementation, infrastructure, regulation.

blocker future hard startup.title: 99% of AI Startups Will Be Dead by 2026 — Here's Why
blocker future hard startup.snippet: Hardware supply, regulatory risks, robotics are the hard blockers facing AI startups in the near future.

blocker future hard startup.title: Physical Intelligence robotics startup
blocker future hard startup.snippet: Physical Intelligence is working on general-purpose AI for robots, a technically hard blocker problem for future deployment.

blocker market prediction startup.title: Polymarket Acquires YC-Backed Startup Dome
blocker market prediction startup.snippet: Polymarket acquired Dome — a YC-backed startup with a unified API for prediction markets — to boost prediction market infrastructure. Dome aggregates real-time data from Polymarket and Kalshi.

blocker market prediction startup.title: Dome: A unified API for prediction markets - Y Combinator
blocker market prediction startup.snippet: Dome makes it easy to build on prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi, providing developer infrastructure for prediction-market resolution.

blocker market prediction startup.title: Better Opinions: Prediction market of India - Y Combinator
blocker market prediction startup.snippet: Better Opinions is a YC-backed prediction market startup focused on the Indian market, addressing the prediction-market resolution mechanism for emerging markets.

blocker like market startup.title: Singaporean AI startup disrupting market research - CNBC
blocker like market startup.snippet: AI Palette uses AI-powered market research with real-time predictive analytics; the startup is positioned to disrupt the 100-year-old market research industry.

blocker like market startup.title: Funding an AI Startup in 2025 - Lighter Capital
blocker like market startup.snippet: AI startups face funding blockers like market timing, regulatory clarity, and unit-economics convergence.

blocker like market startup.title: Blockit AI calendar scheduling - TechCrunch
blocker like market startup.snippet: Blockit raised $5M seed for AI-driven scheduling, addressing a known market blocker like calendar friction.
